data.en: You can go to primary school.
data.hint: Modal verb / 情态动词之后用动词原形

data.en: You can have an ID card.
data.hint: Use 'an' before a vowel sound / 在元音音素前使用 'an'

data.en: You have to pay to go on trains.
data.hint: Expressing obligation / 表达必须

data.en: You can ride a bike on the road.
data.cn: 你可以在路上骑自行车。
data.hint: Preposition of place / 介词 (在路上)

data.en: You can have a credit card.
data.hint: Modal verb / 情态动词之后用原形

data.en: At what age can you do these things?
data.cn: 你在什么年龄能做这些事？
data.hint: Question word order / 疑问句语序

data.en: What can you learn to do?
data.hint: Verb pattern: learn to do / 动词搭配

data.en: How much do you grow this year?
data.hint: Present tense auxiliary verb / 一般现在时助动词

data.en: What do you know about the film?
data.cn: 关于这部电影你知道什么？
data.hint: Preposition 'about' / 介词 'about'

data.en: Name one word with the same sound.
data.cn: 说出一个发音相同的单词。
data.hint: Imperative sentence / 祈使句以动词原形开头

data.en: I was four and he was ten months old.
data.hint: Past tense 'be' verb / 过去时 'be' 动词
accept: He was ten months old and I was four.

data.en: He was noisy and I was not happy.
data.hint: Adjective / 形容词
accept: I was not happy and he was noisy.

data.en: I was six and he was three.
data.hint: Past state / 过去的状态
accept: He was three and I was six.

data.en: He was naughty and I was angry.
data.hint: Past tense 'be' verb / 过去时 'be' 动词
accept: I was angry and he was naughty.

data.en: But I still loved him.
data.hint: Past tense regular verb / 规则动词过去式

data.en: We could play football together.
data.hint: Past modal verb / 过去的情态动词

data.en: He was not a good player.
data.hint: Negative past state / 过去否定状态

data.en: We were happy together.
data.hint: Plural past 'be' verb / 复数过去时 'be' 动词

data.en: I am ten now and he is seven.
data.cn: 我现在十岁了，他七岁了。
data.hint: Present tense 'be' verb / 现在时 'be' 动词
accept: He is seven and I am ten now.

data.en: Why does he like growing up?
data.hint: Third person singular question / 第三人称单数疑问句

data.en: Look at all the little eggs.
data.hint: Plural noun / 复数名词

data.en: The eggs are in a shell.
data.hint: Preposition of place / 地点介词

data.en: The shell is dry and brown.
data.hint: Adjectives to describe / 描述性形容词
accept: The shell is brown and dry.

data.en: What is coming out with small legs?
data.cn: 长着小腿出来的是什么？
data.hint: Present continuous / 现在进行时

data.en: It is a small caterpillar.
data.hint: Indefinite article / 不定冠词

data.en: It is climbing up the garden wall.
data.hint: Present continuous verb / 现在进行时动词

data.en: Now it is sleeping.
data.hint: Present continuous verb / 现在进行时动词

data.en: Now it is a butterfly.
data.hint: Current state / 现在的状态

data.en: It is beautiful and bright.
data.hint: Adjectives / 形容词

data.en: What is the life cycle of it?
data.hint: Preposition 'of' / 介词 'of'

data.en: Let us measure your height.
data.hint: Let + base verb / Let + 动词原形

data.en: We can measure height ourselves.
data.hint: Reflexive pronoun / 反身代词

data.en: It is not easy to grow up.
data.hint: Infinitive form / 动词不定式

data.en: Choose another animal to share.
data.cn: 选择另一种动物来分享。
data.hint: Imperative verb / 祈使句动词原形

data.en: What is the meaning of growing up?
data.hint: Gerund after preposition / 介词后的动名词

data.en: Last week I was in a summer camp.
data.cn: 上周我在一个夏令营里。
data.hint: Past time marker 'was' / 过去时间标志词 'was'
accept: I was in a summer camp last week.

data.en: Share a growing up moment with others.
data.cn: 与他人分享一个成长的时刻。
data.hint: Preposition 'with' / 介词 'with'

data.en: Talk about the meaning of growing up.
data.hint: Phrasal verb / 动词短语 (谈论)

data.en: We use the simple past tense.
data.hint: Present tense verb / 一般现在时动词

data.en: I was in a summer camp.
data.hint: Preposition of place / 地点介词

data.en: It is a very exciting experience.
data.cn: 这是一次非常令人兴奋的经历。
data.hint: Adjective ending in -ing / -ing结尾的形容词

data.en: I was nervous before the training.
data.hint: Past state / 过去的状态
accept: Before the training I was nervous.

data.en: The third training was difficult.
data.hint: Ordinal number / 序数词

data.en: But we were very brave.
data.hint: Plural past 'be' verb / 复数过去时 'be' 动词

data.en: We can do it ourselves.
data.cn: 我们可以自己做这件事。
data.hint: Reflexive pronoun / 反身代词

data.en: Let us clap for ourselves.
data.hint: Preposition 'for' / 介词 'for'

data.en: I will be able to use words.
data.hint: Base verb after 'to' / 'to' 之后用动词原形

data.en: Use words and expressions about growing up.
data.cn: 使用关于长大的单词和表达。
data.hint: Preposition 'about' / 介词 'about'

data.en: My little brother was noisy.
data.hint: Past tense 'be' verb / 过去时 'be' 动词

data.en: We play football together.
data.hint: Base verb for plural subject / 复数主语用动词原形
